comparison_rule: Case included when self_consistency_3 is correct and broad_diversity_aggregation_v1 is incorrect on aligned example.

definitions.insufficient_diversity_realized: <=1 answer group realized for broad candidate.
definitions.aggregation_concentration_failure: Diversity materialized and support fraction >= 0.75 but still wrong.
definitions.other_or_mixed: Residual cases not mapped cleanly to dominant buckets.
